# Zaply — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Zaply is a WhatsApp automation tool built for developers and businesses, hosted on GitHub. It enables users to automate, schedule, and send WhatsApp messages programmatically. The project has a technical, developer-friendly identity with a focus on productivity and communication efficiency through API-driven automation.

---

## Pages

### Início
https://example.com
Automatize, agende e dispare mensagens no WhatsApp em massa via API. Zaply é a ferramenta open source perfeita para devs e empresas que buscam eficiência em comunicação programática. Comece agora no GitHub.

### Obrigado pelo Contato - Zaply
https://example.com/thank-you
Obrigado por entrar em contato com a Zaply. Recebemos sua mensagem sobre nosso serviço de envio de mensagens em massa e retornaremos em breve.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Zaply
Zaply is a WhatsApp automation tool built for developers and businesses, hosted on GitHub. It enables users to automate, schedule, and send WhatsApp messages programmatically. The project has a technical, developer-friendly identity with a focus on productivity and communication efficiency through API-driven automation.

## Target Audience
- Small Business Owners
- E-commerce Sellers
- Freelancers & Consultants

## Industry
SaaS / Messaging Automation

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
